description: Specialising in fashionable style, and crafted by skilled Indian craftsmen, murcia bags use the finest materials and hardware in their products. This stylishly silhouetted bag embodies the essence of the modern Indian woman - unapologetically fashionable. Clash this subtly bright piece with tonal outfits for maximum impact Made of synthetic leatherette with a floral embellishment on the front and textured upper Two glossy shoulder handles One main roomy compartment with a zippered pocket and a two pouches inside One zippered pocket at the back Bag care Wipe surface with a dry, clean cloth to remove dust
